---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Resources
:::

This page will host curated resources for families, educators, and trainees — particularly around school attendance, emotionally based school avoidance, and child wellbeing.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: role-section
::: role-block
[Resources coming soon]{.role-title}
[Content will be added here as it is developed. Check back or [get in touch](../contact.html) if you're looking for something specific.]{.role-desc}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
[Back to Clinical overview →](index.qmd){.about-link}
:::
